To,

IOCL Haldia Refinery, Haldia 721606.

in above orders of the item/s against Gem Bid/Tender No. GEM/2026/B/7319588

local content  
Quantity Percentage of 
local content

Desktop Computer (HP 400 G9) 
473 
26% 
HP India Private Limited

We also understand, false declarations will be in breach of the Code of Integrity under Rule 
175(1)(i)(h) of the General Financial Rule for which a bidder or its successors can be debarred for up 
to two years as per Rule 151(iii) of the General Financial Rules along with such other actions as may 
be permissible under law. 
I/we certify that transportation, insurance, installation, commissioning, training, after sales service 
support like AMC/CMC, etc.) not claimed as a Local Value addition 
 
Techigent Technology Pvt Ltd.  
  
 
Shubham Bhosale 9004653932
